nasb.text: in the day that the watchmen of the house tremble, and mighty men stoop, the grinding ones stand idle because they are few, and those who look through windows grow dim;

esv.text: in the day when the keepers of the house tremble, and the strong men are bent, and the grinders cease because they are few, and those who look through the windows are dimmed,

cnv.text: 那時，看守房子的發抖，強壯的彎腰，推磨的稀少，都停了工，往窗外看的都昏暗了，

ccb.text: 守卫家园的手脚颤抖，强壮的身躯变得弯腰驼背；牙齿稀少，无法咀嚼；视力衰退，看不清楚；

csbs.text: 在那个日子，看守家的颤抖， 强壮的男人弯腰， 推磨的女人因为人少而停工， 向窗外看的人眼目昏暗；
